zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk FitzWarin III於1160年出生在英國史洛普爾廷頓時，他的父親Fulk FitzWarin II14歲，母親Hawise de Dinan14歲。他於1207年10月1日與Maud Le Vavasour在英國史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年10月8日在他的家鄉享年98歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾阿爾波波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk FitzWarin III于1160年出生在英国史洛普爾廷頓时，他的父亲Fulk FitzWarin II14岁，母亲Hawise de Dinan14岁。他于1207年10月1日与Maud Le Vavasour在英国史洛普爾廷頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年10月8日在他的家乡享年98岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾阿爾波波利。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk FitzWarin III was born in 1160, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, his father, Fulk FitzWarin II, was 14 and his mother, Hawise de Dinan, was 14. He married Maud Le Vavasour on 1 October 1207, in Whittington, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 8 October 1258, in his hometown, at the age of 98, and was buried in Alberbury, Shropshire, England.

fr.Hazlewood With Storiths, Yorkshire, Engl: Hazlewood with Storiths, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk FitzWarin III est né en 1160, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk FitzWarin II, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Dinan, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Maud Le Vavasour le 1 octobre 1207, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1258, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterré à Alberbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

Oktober 1207 in Whittington, Shropshire, England Maud Le Vavasour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin III è nato il nel 1160 nel Whittington, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Fulk FitzWarin II, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Dinan, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Maud Le Vavasour il 1 ottobre 1207, nel Whittington, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 ottobre 1258, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 98 anni, e fu sepolto a Alberbury, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin IIIが1160年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin IIは14歳，母Hawise de Dinanは14歳であった。1207年10月1日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでMaud Le Vavasourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年10月8日に故郷で98歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアアルバーブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hazlewood With Storiths, Yorkshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하즐루드 위스 스토리스
ko.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin III(이)가 1160년 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin II(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Dinan(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1207년 10월 1일 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Maud Le Vavasour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 10월 8일 그의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 알버버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin III nasceu em 1160, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin II, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Dinan, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Le Vavasour em 1 de outubro de 1207, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1258, em sua cidade natal, com 98 anos, e foi sepultado em Alberbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Hazlewood With Storiths, Yorkshire, Engl: хазльвуд вит сторитс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk FitzWarin III родился в 1160 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin II было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Dinan, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Le Vavasour 1 октября 1207 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 8 октября 1258 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 98 лет и был похоронен в местности альбирбури, шропшир, Англия.

Se casó con Maud Le Vavasour el 1 de octubre de 1207, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1258, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años, y fue sepultado en Alberbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
